If at the start of the phase:
  -> Roll 8D6 (max 2 activations):
    - Unbridled Bloodlust: needs a pair of 1+ -> re-roll failed charge rolls for all friendly units
    - Rage-Fuelled Invigoration: needs a pair of 2+ -> all friendly units pile in and consolidate up to 6"
    - Total Carnage: needs a pair of 3+ -> if destroyed by a melee attack and not has fought this phase: roll D6: on 4+, this model can fight after being destroyed
    - Martial Excellence: needs a pair of 4+ -> all friendly units' melee weapons gain Sustained Hits 1
    - Warp Blades: needs a pair of 5+ -> all friendly units' melee weapons gain Lethal Hits
    - Decapitating Strikes: needs a triple of 6+ -> if the target has "Infantry" and for melee attacks: all friendly units' weapons gain Devastating Wounds
Scope: any on battlefield. Duration: battle round.

If during the fight phase:
  -> the unit fights first
Scope: unit. Duration: phase.

Scope: aura 6". Duration: permanent.

If during the fight phase:
  -> spend 1 pain token
  -> Choose one (empower-melee-attacks):

    2. if not (the unit has "CHARACTER"): set Attacks to 4 for the unit; the unit's melee weapons gain Hazardous
Scope: self. Duration: phase.

  If destroyed by a ranged attack:

    If not (the target has "AFFLICTED"):
      -> Roll D6: on 5+, enemy units in range's weapons gain Afflicted

  -> friendly units in range gain blessings of khorne

  -> this model can fight after being destroyed
  -> this model can shoot after being destroyed
Scope: unit. Duration: permanent.

  -> return D3 models to the unit with full wounds
  -> the unit can move through engagement range
Scope: self. Duration: phase.

If the unit remained stationary:
  -> the unit's weapons gain Sustained Hits 1
Scope: unit. Duration: permanent.

If during the movement phase, in either player's turn, at the end of the phase, and within range of an area terrain feature:
  -> tag the terrain area as shadow of chaos

tag the terrain area as shadow of chaos

  -> re roll battle shock tests for friendly units in range
Scope: aura 6". Duration: permanent.

If during the movement phase:
  -> this model gains through non titanic models
  -> this model gains through terrain 4 or less
  -> this model can move through engagement range
  -> this model gains through terrain over 4 inches
  If after moving through tall terrain:
    -> Roll D6: on exactly 1, apply battle shock tests for this model
Scope: self. Duration: phase.

If during the movement phase:
  -> spend 1 pain token
  -> the unit can deep strike more than 6" from enemy units
  If an enemy unit is within 9":
    -> the unit cannot declare a charge
Scope: unit. Duration: turn.

  If the model is leading a unit:
    If not an enemy unit is within engagement range:
